packet:e3f8d9d8-519a-4d3f-b9f3-17ba6d5d9.title: Repo state supports three concrete rollout conventions. Git-master should assume a branch-and-PR workflow off `main`, not direct commits on `main`; Builder should default to product-code surfaces (`src/`, `tests/`) and avoid repo docs and live `.control-tower/` operational state unless a packet explicitly targets bootstrap/runtime plumbing; Scribe should treat `docs/` as canonical durable documentation, `.control-tower/docs/state` as canonical only for Tower operational status/tasks/open questions, and `.control-tower/memory` as derived non-canonical memory. Main rollout risk is that the bootstrap is still uncurated and uncommitted on `main` while the queued Scribe handoff remains blocked by Codex auth failure.

dec_inferred_e3f8d9d8-519a-4d3f-b9f3-17b.title: This repo already signals a branch-and-PR workflow on top of `main` through multiple `codex/*`, `copilot/*`, and `claude/*` branches merged back to `main`.
dec_inferred_e3f8d9d8-519a-4d3f-b9f3-17b.summary: Inferred from ResultPacket memory_worthy entry: This repo already signals a branch-and-PR workflow on top of `main` through multiple `codex/*`, `copilot/*`, and `claude/*` branches merged back to `main`.
rationale: Captured from a ResultPacket memory_worthy entry pending curation.

dec_inferred_e3f8d9d8-519a-4d3f-b9f3-17b.title: For this repo, Builder should avoid live `.control-tower/` operational state by default; Scribe owns docs/memory curation and `docs/` is the durable source of truth.
dec_inferred_e3f8d9d8-519a-4d3f-b9f3-17b.summary: Inferred from ResultPacket memory_worthy entry: For this repo, Builder should avoid live `.control-tower/` operational state by default; Scribe owns docs/memory curation and `docs/` is the durable source of truth.
rationale: Captured from a ResultPacket memory_worthy entry pending curation.

dec_inferred_e3f8d9d8-519a-4d3f-b9f3-17b.title: Bootstrap rollout is currently blocked on Codex auth recovery and pending Scribe curation, so untracked `.control-tower/` contents should not be treated as final operating guidance yet.

packet:2bd4e3b3-6776-434b-8a51-b338cc64f.title: Refresh tower init Codex model defaults

packet:25df214e-7c8f-4a4f-a40a-1edb5d0df.title: Recommend replacing the current hardcoded Codex init shortlist in `src/control_tower/config_ui.py` with exactly these five options, in order: `gpt-5.4`, `gpt-5.4-mini`, `gpt-5.3-codex`, `gpt-5.2-codex`, `gpt-5.2`. This is the best current blend of official OpenAI guidance and current local Codex CLI reality: official docs say to start with `gpt-5.4` and use `gpt-5.4-mini`/`gpt-5.4-nano` for cheaper lower-latency work, while the local Codex CLI v0.117.0 visible model list currently prioritizes `gpt-5.4`, `gpt-5.4-mini`, then legacy-but-still-listed Codex-optimized fallbacks (`gpt-5.3-codex`, `gpt-5.2-codex`, `gpt-5.2`).

dec_inferred_25df214e-7c8f-4a4f-a40a-1ed.title: As of 2026-03-31, the best current Tower init shortlist for the Codex backend is `gpt-5.4`, `gpt-5.4-mini`, `gpt-5.3-codex`, `gpt-5.2-codex`, `gpt-5.2`.
dec_inferred_25df214e-7c8f-4a4f-a40a-1ed.summary: Inferred from ResultPacket memory_worthy entry: As of 2026-03-31, the best current Tower init shortlist for the Codex backend is `gpt-5.4`, `gpt-5.4-mini`, `gpt-5.3-codex`, `gpt-5.2-codex`, `gpt-5.2`.
rationale: Captured from a ResultPacket memory_worthy entry pending curation.

dec_inferred_25df214e-7c8f-4a4f-a40a-1ed.title: Official OpenAI docs now position `gpt-5.4` as the default starting point and `gpt-5.4-mini`/`gpt-5.4-nano` as the lower-cost frontier variants, while local Codex CLI still visibly lists older Codex-specific fallback models.
dec_inferred_25df214e-7c8f-4a4f-a40a-1ed.summary: Inferred from ResultPacket memory_worthy entry: Official OpenAI docs now position `gpt-5.4` as the default starting point and `gpt-5.4-mini`/`gpt-5.4-nano` as the lower-cost frontier variants, while local Codex CLI still visibly lists older Codex-specific fallback models.
